title: Operator Steering: Screenshot And Video Adversarial XR QA
citation: Patrick Gidich steering in the Codex thread on 2026-05-04: use browser screenshots/videos and multimodal adversarial review to judge XR/VR scene fidelity; keep non-blocking suggestions in a backlog.
permitted_uses: Internal planning source for backlog triage, visual QA evidence strategy, and agent memory updates.
claims_supported: Browser screenshots and videos should be treated as review artifacts for adversarial XR/VR scene fidelity checks.
Non-blocking operator suggestions can be captured in a backlog instead of implemented immediately.
claims_not_supported: Automated browser screenshots or videos replace human worn-headset Quest observations.
Any production clinical, regulatory, or assessment validity claim.
